data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Pla: This place is full of cute DOLLS.\pI should buy some for me, instead of\njust for my children.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Get: I'm not big enough to raise POKéMON,\nso I'm getting a cute DOLL instead.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Sel: They sell many cute MATS here.\pI wonder which one I should get?\nMaybe I'll buy them all...
